case_title: SECOND ROUND SUB, LLC VS. JACOB WILLIAMS ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE CIVIL CODE 1788.60 (TRANSACTION ID # 100177677) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECOND ROUND SUB, LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100138143) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECOND ROUND SUB, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, JACOB DOES I THROUGH X, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-31-2022

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-27-2022 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
